dc_cfg_op(.flag(1), .id(`LOCAL_CORE_ID), .op(0), .sn(30), .a(16'h9a00), .ea(0), .d(64'h0000000000000001), .rc(8));

// Core2_1

// Thread_0, Task Name: identity_2, OP_Code: Transfer

// MFOP Extra Info configuration
dc_cfg_op(.flag(1), .id(`LOCAL_CORE_ID), .op(0), .sn(30), .a(16'h9170), .ea(0), .d(64'h0000000000000000), .rc(8));
